projects.label: Prototype 01
projects.title: Stem
projects.description: An elegant URL shortener that trims, brands, and tracks every link — even on your own domain — without the clutter.

projects.label: Prototype 02
projects.title: Relief Hover
projects.description: A WebGL tool for designing a metallic, light-follows-cursor hover-reveal effect and exporting it as a ready-to-use Framer component.

projects.label: Prototype 03
projects.title: Running Log
projects.description: The portfolio site itself — a self-updating log where each prototype is captured as a looping GIF of its best moment and published with a single command.

projects.label: Prototype 04
projects.title: Fractal Campus
projects.description: A Framer landing page for a Williamsburg coworking space for builders, where a warm light follows your cursor across neoclassical reliefs as you scroll.
